h1. Metadata Ingestion Service

h2. Purpose

Reads metadata from MongoDB and/or crawlers, validates records, resolves relationships, and prepares normalized records for downstream AI and graph projections.

h2. In Scope

* Read MVP entity collections
* Validate required fields
* Resolve *jrn* relationships
* Resolve Node references
* Normalize owner metadata
* Track indexing status
* Detect changed records
* Log failures and retries

h2. Out of Scope

* AI answer generation
* Vector search
* Neo4j traversal
* Human feedback handling

h2. Inputs

|| Input || Source || Notes ||
| Distribution records | MongoDB | Physical asset metadata |
| Dataset records | MongoDB | Logical asset metadata |
| DataModelEntity records | MongoDB | Entity/table/view metadata |
| DataModelAttribute records | MongoDB | Attribute/column metadata |
| DataService records | MongoDB | Exposure/access metadata |
| DataFlow records | MongoDB | Observed lineage |
| DataProcess records | MongoDB | Process and transformation lineage |
| Node records | MongoDB | Foundational relationship entity |
| Report records | MongoDB | Report metadata |

h2. Outputs

|| Output || Consumer ||
| Validated entity records | Chunk Builder |
| Relationship-resolved records | Chunk Builder / Graph Builder |
| Indexing candidates | Embedding Service / Graph Builder |
| Validation failures | Operations Dashboard |

h2. Primary Requirements

|| ID || Requirement || Priority ||
| ING-001 | Read selected MongoDB collections | P0 |
| ING-002 | Validate required fields | P0 |
| ING-003 | Resolve JRN relationships | P0 |
| ING-004 | Resolve Node references | P0 |
| ING-005 | Normalize owner metadata | P0 |
| ING-006 | Track indexing status | P0 |
| ING-007 | Detect changed records | P1 |
| ING-008 | Support retry handling | P1 |

h2. Success Criteria

* MVP entities can be read in batch mode.
* Invalid records are logged with reason.
* Related records can be resolved by *jrn*.
* Changed records can be identified for reindexing.
* Ingestion status is visible by entity type.

h2. Pitfalls / Risks

|| Risk || Impact || Mitigation ||
| Incomplete relationship resolution | Downstream lineage/search answers become incomplete | Build relationship resolver with failure logging |
| Missing Node resolution | Access/security and lineage context are weak | Build Node resolver early |
| Invalid source records are silently skipped | Data loss and low trust | Persist validation failures and report counts |
| No indexing status | Operations team cannot debug sync issues | Build indexing status collection in Phase 1 |
